skills.summary: PR author checklist: gates, agents code-review, agents triage, one commit per finding; draft → ready for review.
List PR review assignments, require explicit user pick of one or more PRs, harness and report.md review per PR, then agents code-review post per PR after approval.
Open authored PRs (inbox list-mine), collect unresolved review threads, triage --from pr-feedback, one commit per item, submit thread replies after approval.
